description_long: This is a brightly colored plastic water gun, primarily featuring a combination of blue and orange hues. The body is robust and elongated, with a large cylindrical water reservoir mounted on top, capped at the rear and connected to the nozzle via a pair of curved blue tubes. The grip is textured with a series of small raised squares for improved handling, and the trigger is positioned just below the main body, designed for easy access. The nozzle at the front is conical and orange, with a blue tip, and appears to be a single-stream type. The surface shows signs of wear, with visible scuff marks and some faded areas, suggesting frequent use. A visible logo is present on the side of the reservoir, adding a branded touch to the toy.
description: A large, blue and orange plastic water gun with a cylindrical top reservoir, textured grip, and a conical nozzle. The surface is worn, and a logo is visible on the side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the water gun, the cylindrical reservoir, curved tubes, and the logo on the reservoir.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rounded end of the reservoir and the symmetry of the curved tubes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 but without a visible logo, showing the grip and trigger area clearly.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the conical nozzle and the alignment of the tubes and reservoir.
attribute_brand_logo: A white circular logo with blue text is visible on the side of the orange water reservoir, partially obscured by the blue tube.
attribute_trigger_design: The trigger is a standard pull type, located below the main body, colored blue, and appears to be slightly curved for ergonomic finger placement.
attribute_nozzle_type: The nozzle is conical, orange with a blue tip, and appears to be a single-stream type with a central opening.
attribute_water_reservoir_style: The water reservoir is a large, integrated, cylindrical orange tank mounted on top, with a rounded rear cap and blue connecting tubes; it is not visibly detachable.
attribute_grip_pattern: The grip area is blue with a grid of small raised squares, providing a textured, non-slip surface that extends along the lower handle.
